stemHtml:
Due to a drive failure, the slats of a transport category aircraft do not retract properly after take-off.Based on the flight planning data given below, calculate the time penalty in per cent for the flight, based on endurance.

Usable fuel 8 540 kg 
Fuel consumption 2 600 kg/h 
Final reserve fuel 1100 kg

(Note: consider 60% fuel penalty for flap/slat failure and 180% for gear retraction failure)
